_comment: Smoke-test baseline sweep for Llama 3 8B on TPU v7x. 2 combos.
Goal: validate the sweep-driver framework end-to-end before
kicking off the full ~36-combo baseline sweep. Disables the
request_distribution stays [D, D, T] and the kernel skips its
PREFILL pass — exactly the main-branch behavior.
NUM_PROMPTS=100 keep the smoke run fast. The 1800-token prompts
+ 128-token outputs from the case file fit comfortably.
prefill consumes 1800 of the 2048 step budget, leaving only
248 for decode tokens — far less than MAX_NUM_SEQS=128 could
fill. Throughput will look degraded vs the 4096 row, which is
fine for a 'does it run?' smoke test but not an apples-to-apples
